name: Pinto Bean Soup with Mint and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sunflower oil or light olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight; drain.
2. Transfer to a large soup pot and cover with fresh water. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes, then drain and rinse.
3. Warm the oil in the soup pot. Add the onion and red chile; cook briefly.
4. Add the beans and 10 cups of water. Bring to a boil.
5. Simmer until the beans are tender (about 45 minutes for new beans, longer for older beans).
6. Season with salt to taste. Continue cooking until completely soft.
7. Puree half the beans and cooking liquid at a time in a blender until smooth. Return the puree to the pot.
8. Add the cream and reheat.
9. Chop toasted pine nuts finely. Stir in the chopped herbs, reserving some chives.
10. Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with remaining chives and pine nuts.
